title: tephrosia dura
intro: Tephrosia dura, also known as hard horsefly or hard tephrosia, is a plant species native to South Africa that belongs to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihelmintic properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as treating fever, rheumatism, and intestinal worms, as well as providing protection against certain infections. Tephrosia dura can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
